title: NBM to Zarr — Data Catalog
description: NOAA NBM CONUS forecast & historical analysis reformatted to Zarr.

datasets.title: NOAA NBM CONUS Historical Analysis (daily best estimate)
datasets.description: National Blend of Models (NBM) CONUS daily historical analysis: one best-estimate value per calendar day on the native ~2.5 km Lambert conformal grid. Built from lead-day 1 of each 00z NBM forecast (shortest lead valid on the day). Variables: tmean/tmax/tmin (degC), precip (mm), srad (MJ/m^2/day).

datasets.title: NOAA NBM CONUS Analysis — short sample (full-res, GitHub-hosted)
datasets.description: National Blend of Models (NBM) CONUS daily historical analysis: one best-estimate value per calendar day on the native ~2.5 km Lambert conformal grid. Built from lead-day 1 of each 00z NBM forecast (shortest lead valid on the day). Variables: tmean/tmax/tmin (degC), precip (mm), srad (MJ/m^2/day).
datasets.data_status: Real NBM-derived analysis at full resolution.
datasets.hosting: Committed directly to this GitHub repo (free, no object store)
